factors.data_availability: medium — 891 total specimens but BRAF V600E annotation nearly absent in commercial biobanks
factors.org_discoverability: medium — commercial suppliers discoverable; academic thyroid surgery biobanks harder to find
factors.biomarker_specificity: high — BRAF V600E mutation status is a hard requirement; annotated in <2% of available specimens

expected_failure_modes: BRAF V600E annotation not tracked in most commercial biobank registries — pipeline must not present BRAF-annotated specimens as widely available
Thyroid cancer literature focuses on FNA cytology not surgical FFPE — PubMed search may surface cohorts that do not have matched FFPE
Serum matching is rare in thyroid surgery studies — 14 confirmed matched pairs vs N=50 required is a structural gap the pipeline must surface
Buffy coat specimens (Stibion, 214 specimens) should not be recommended as serum equivalents
May find valid academic sources (SEER-linked thyroid biobanks, NCI TCGA-THCA cohort) not in AminoChain
